syntax_2174.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_2174.title: Location Box
syntax_2174.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a box (only the corners!).

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a box (only the corners!).

syntax_2175.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_2175.title: Location Box Outline
syntax_2175.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_2175.syntax_pattern: box outline between %location% and %location% with density %number%

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_2176.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_2176.title: Vector Box
syntax_2176.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box (only the corners!).

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box (only the corners!).

syntax_2177.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_2177.title: Vector Box Outline
syntax_2177.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_2177.syntax_pattern: vector box outline between %vector% and %vector% with density %number%

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a box including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1330.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1330.title: Frame of Entity
syntax_1330.description: Gives the reference frame of an entity. The reference frame is used to get locations with respect to the entities orientation.

en: Gives the reference frame of an entity. The reference frame is used to get locations with respect to the entities orientation.

syntax_1332.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1332.title: Location Cube
syntax_1332.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a cube (only the corners!). To get a list of locations including the cube edges use cube outline.

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a cube (only the corners!). To get a list of locations including the cube edges use cube outline.

syntax_1333.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1333.title: Location Cube Outline
syntax_1333.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a cube, including the corners and vertices of the cube. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1333.syntax_pattern: cube[s] outline[s] at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a cube, including the corners and vertices of the cube. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1338.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1338.title: Location Link All
syntax_1338.description: Creates a list of locations linking multiple locations with lines. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of locations linking multiple locations with lines. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
Gives the midpoint between locations.

syntax_1340.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1340.title: Location Move
syntax_1340.description: Moves a list of locations from one location to another.
syntax_1340.syntax_pattern:
%locations% with center %location% (moved|shifted) to %location%
%locations% with center %location% (moved|shifted) to %location%

en: Moves a list of locations from one location to another.

syntax_1341.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1341.title: Location Offset
syntax_1341.description: Calculates the offset of locations from vectors.

en: Calculates the offset of locations from vectors.

syntax_1342.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1342.title: Location Polygon
syntax_1342.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a polygon (only the corners!). If you want a polygon with edges use polygon outline.

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a polygon (only the corners!). If you want a polygon with edges use polygon outline.

syntax_1343.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1343.title: Location Polygon Outline
syntax_1343.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1343.syntax_pattern: polygon[s] outline[s] at %locations% with %number% (vertex|vertices|vertexes|points)(,| and) radius %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
Converts degree to radian

syntax_1328.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1328.title: Frame Yaw and Pitch
syntax_1328.description: Yaw and pitch of a frame. Mainly used to rotate or incline reference frames

en: Yaw and pitch of a frame. Mainly used to rotate or incline reference frames

syntax_1334.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1334.title: Location Cylinder Coordinate
syntax_1334.description: Gives locations in a cylindrical coordinate system.
syntax_1334.syntax_pattern: cylinder coordinate[s] at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) yaw %number%(,| and) height %number%

en: Gives locations in a cylindrical coordinate system.

syntax_1335.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1335.title: Location Helix
syntax_1335.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a helix. The step parameter determines how many blocks the helix will go upwards in one rotation. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1335.syntax_pattern: heli(x|xes|ces) at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) height %number%(,| and) step[(height|size)] %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a helix. The step parameter determines how many blocks the helix will go upwards in one rotation. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1336.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1336.title: Location Line
syntax_1336.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a line. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a line. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1337.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1337.title: Location Line Coordinate
syntax_1337.description: Gives a location on the line between two locations. The number parameter describes how far the point is from the first location. A value of 0 corresponds the the start (first location). A value of 1 corresponds to the end (location 2). 0.5 is the midpoint between the two locations.

en: Gives a location on the line between two locations. The number parameter describes how far the point is from the first location. A value of 0 corresponds the the start (first location). A value of 1 corresponds to the end (location 2). 0.5 is the midpoint between the two locations.

syntax_1329.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1329.title: Frame from Yaw and Pitch
syntax_1329.description: Creates a reference frame from a yaw and a pitch.

en: Creates a reference frame from a yaw and a pitch.

syntax_1346.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1346.title: Location Rotate
syntax_1346.description: Rotates locations around a rotation center and a rotation axis by an angle.

en: Rotates locations around a rotation center and a rotation axis by an angle.

syntax_1347.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1347.title: Location Rotate XYZ
syntax_1347.description: Rotates locations around a rotation center and rotation axis by an angle.

en: Rotates locations around a rotation center and rotation axis by an angle.

syntax_1348.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1348.title: Location Scale
syntax_1348.description: Scales locations from a center by a scaling factor. The direction parameter adds an additional scaling along the x-, y- and z-axis.

en: Scales locations from a center by a scaling factor. The direction parameter adds an additional scaling along the x-, y- and z-axis.

syntax_1354.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1354.title: Vector Cube Outline
syntax_1354.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1356.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1356.title: Vector Line
syntax_1356.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a line. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a line. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1357.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1357.title: Vector Line Between Vectors
syntax_1357.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a line between the two given vectors. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a line between the two given vectors. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1358.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1358.title: Vector Link All
syntax_1358.description: Creates a list of vectors linking multiple vectors with lines. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors linking multiple vectors with lines. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
Gives the midpoint between vectors.

syntax_1361.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1361.title: Vector Polygon
syntax_1361.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon (only the corners!). If you want a polygon with edges use polygon outline.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon (only the corners!). If you want a polygon with edges use polygon outline.

syntax_1362.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1362.title: Vector Polygon Outline
syntax_1362.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a polygon including corners and edges. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1363.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1363.title: Vector Random Sphere
syntax_1363.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a sphere. The locations are randomly distributed on the sphere surface.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a sphere. The locations are randomly distributed on the sphere surface.

syntax_1364.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1364.title: Vector Reflection
syntax_1364.description: Mirrors vectors in another vector. The direction parameter applies an additional scaling for each axis.

en: Mirrors vectors in another vector. The direction parameter applies an additional scaling for each axis.

syntax_1365.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1365.title: Vector Rotate
syntax_1365.description: Rotates vectors around a rotation center and a rotation axis by an angle.

en: Rotates vectors around a rotation center and a rotation axis by an angle.

syntax_1366.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1366.title: Vector Rotate XYZ
syntax_1366.description: Rotates vectors around a rotation center and rotation axis by an angle.

en: Rotates vectors around a rotation center and rotation axis by an angle.

syntax_1367.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1367.title: Vector Scale
syntax_1367.description: Scales vectors by a scaling factor and an optional direction. The direction parameter adds an additional scaling along the x-, y- and z-axis.

en: Scales vectors by a scaling factor and an optional direction. The direction parameter adds an additional scaling along the x-, y- and z-axis.

syntax_1345.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1345.title: Location Reflection
syntax_1345.description: Mirrors locations in another location. The direction parameter applies an additional scaling for each axis.

en: Mirrors locations in another location. The direction parameter applies an additional scaling for each axis.

syntax_1349.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1349.title: Location Sphere
syntax_1349.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a sphere. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1349.syntax_pattern: sphere[s] at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a sphere. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1350.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1350.title: Location Sphere Coordinate
syntax_1350.description: Gives locations in a spherical coordinate system.
syntax_1350.syntax_pattern: spher(e|ic[al]) (coordinate[s]|position[s]|location[s]) at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) yaw %number%(,| and) pitch %number%

en: Gives locations in a spherical coordinate system.
Converts radian to degree

syntax_1353.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1353.title: Vector Cube
syntax_1353.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a cube (only the corners!). To get a list of locations including the cube edges use cube outline.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a cube (only the corners!). To get a list of locations including the cube edges use cube outline.
Offset vectors by other vectors.

syntax_1352.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1352.title: Vector Circle
syntax_1352.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a circle

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a circle

syntax_1370.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1370.title: Frame
syntax_1370.description: Reference frame that can be used to get vectors relative to some direction.
syntax_1370.type_usage:
frame of %entity%
frame with yaw %number% and pitch %number%

en: Reference frame that can be used to get vectors relative to some direction.

syntax_1369.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1369.title: Vector in Frame
syntax_1369.description: Converts a vector in a reference frame to the standard Minecraft coordinates.

en: Converts a vector in a reference frame to the standard Minecraft coordinates.

syntax_1344.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1344.title: Location Random Sphere
syntax_1344.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a sphere. The locations are randomly distributed on the sphere surface.
syntax_1344.syntax_pattern: random sphere[s] at %locations% with radius %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a sphere. The locations are randomly distributed on the sphere surface.

syntax_1531.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1531.title: Location Path
syntax_1531.description: Creates a path between the locations. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a path between the locations. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1368.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1368.title: Vector Sphere
syntax_1368.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a sphere. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a sphere. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1331.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1331.title: Location Circle
syntax_1331.description: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a circle. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1331.syntax_pattern: circle[s] at %locations%[ with] radius %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of locations in the shape of a circle. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1532.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1532.title: Vector Offset
syntax_1532.description: Adds each offset to all vectors

en: Adds each offset to all vectors

syntax_1533.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1533.title: Vector Path
syntax_1533.description: Creates a path between vectors. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

en: Creates a path between vectors. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.

syntax_1355.creator: bi0qaw
syntax_1355.title: Vector Helix
syntax_1355.description: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a helix. The step parameter determines how many blocks the helix will go upwards in one rotation. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
syntax_1355.syntax_pattern: [vector ]helix with radius %number%(,| and) height %number%(,| and) step[(height|size)] %number%(,| and) density %number%

en: Creates a list of vectors in the shape of a helix. The step parameter determines how many blocks the helix will go upwards in one rotation. The density value controls the amount of points. A higher number increases the amount of points. A density of 1 corresponds to 1 point per block.
